title: Segfault when updating a dropped table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value BIGINT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test', 1000);
UPDATE test_table SET value = 2000 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Segfault when updating a table after it is dropped
